mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_rules (stock_code, stock_name, alert_type, threshold_value, condition_expr, enabled, triggered, last_triggered_at, one_shot, notify_channels, note, created_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{alertType}, #{thresholdValue}, #{conditionExpr}, #{enabled}, #{triggered}, #{lastTriggeredAt}, #{oneShot}, #{notifyChannels}, #{note}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_rules SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, alert_type=#{alertType}, threshold_value=#{thresholdValue}, condition_expr=#{conditionExpr}, enabled=#{enabled}, triggered=#{triggered}, last_triggered_at=#{lastTriggeredAt}, one_shot=#{oneShot}, notify_channels=#{notifyChannels}, note=#{note} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_rules WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} AND enabled = 1
SELECT * FROM alert_rules WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM alert_rules WHERE alert_type = #{alertType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM alert_rules WHERE triggered = 0 AND enabled = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_rules WHERE enabled = 1
